# Simple CAPI

> Simple CAPI is software for agencies and operators who need isolated Meta Conversions API endpoints for multiple clients.

## Core capabilities

- Provision a separate Netlify serverless endpoint for each client.
- Keep Meta Dataset access tokens in server-side environment variables.
- Capture browser attribution and supported customer match fields.
- Deduplicate browser and server Lead and Schedule events with a shared event ID.
- Generate direct-install tracker tags and optional GoHighLevel webhook mappings.

## Canonical site

- [Simple CAPI](https://simplecapi.com/): Coming-soon homepage.
- [Documentation](https://simplecapi.com/docs): Installation, deduplication, matching, and testing guidance.
- [Privacy Policy](https://simplecapi.com/privacy): Account, credential, event, and payment data handling.
- [Terms of Service](https://simplecapi.com/terms): Authorized use and endpoint credit terms.
- [System Status](https://simplecapi.com/status): Provisioner and checkout configuration status.
